title: Safety and efficacy of percutaneous nephrolithotomy
author: Riyadh Al-Toma
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The percutaneous nephrolithotomy is effective and safe surgical procedure for treatment of renal stones of patients with single functioning kidney.
steps_raw: The percutaneous nephrolithotomy is effective and safe surgical procedure for treatment of renal stones of patients with single functioning kidney.
